title: Cat Ladys magazine date
wikitext:
[]: Cat Lady's magazine date             Quote Post by V » Tue Oct 28, 2008 11:09 am I was rewatching episode 15, and I wonder if the front cover of the magazine "Cat Lady" is reading gives an actual date; granted it could be an old copy, but then again it might say like "October 2015" can someone who knows sufficient Japanese check this out?

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Tue Oct 28, 2008 1:56 pm Dear God! Might this be the key to solidifying eva's actual timeline? However part of me thinks it'll probably be another continuity error.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Tue Oct 28, 2008 5:20 pm probably; though I did work out that episode 9 takes place on September 11th, 2015 ( the attack happens on Friday the 11th, and in 2015, only September and December have a Friday the 11th, but we can rule December out, because over a month passes in episode 20 but its still considered "2015" in later episodes; which would be impossible if it were December)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Nov 01, 2008 12:45 am I'm sorry, but do you really think they checked their calanders for the date almost 20 years from when the show was created?

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Nov 01, 2008 9:57 am well...advanced calendars are easily available plus I'm not concerned with the exact date, just like if it says "November" or something

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Nov 01, 2008 11:01 am A number of the Kanji are unclear. I can't make out the Kanji for month/moon anywhere, and there is no month number I can see(Between 1 to 12). I did see, however, a nice bit of product placement from Sega.
